name: Foundation Sponge
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the yeast into the lukewarm water and let stand for 20 minutes.
2. Gradually add flour, mixing until a stiff drop batter forms.
3. Beat the mixture until smooth.
4. Cover and allow it to stand in a warm place overnight until light and bubbly.
5. Note that the larger amount of yeast causes the sponge to work more rapidly.
